name: pr-completion
description: Validate and commit local changes, then deterministically watch GitHub pull requests through CI, reviews, conflicts, and verified merge readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomously drive pull requests to verified merge readiness
interface.longDescription: Discover changed repositories, create validated commits, run a configurable PR state-machine watcher, triage review rounds, resolve upstream conflicts safely, and stop at verified merge readiness without merging or enabling auto-merge.
defaultPrompt: Use $pr-completion:take-pr-to-completion to autonomously drive this pull request through CI, review, and conflicts until it is verified merge-ready. Do not merge or enable auto-merge.
